analysis.consistency: High. The structure aligns perfectly with standard D&D 5e spell formatting. All required fields are present and correctly typed (string, number, array).
analysis.quality: High. The descriptive text, component costs, and scaling mechanics are clearly defined and follow established SRD conventions. The damage output (8d6) is appropriate for a 6th-level spell.

scaling.rule: Damage increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 6th.

components_check.material_cost: powder of a crushed black pearl worth at least 500 gp
